prompt: In the base platform configuration, which incident property determines whether auto-closure is calculated from the resolution date rather than the last updated date?
choices: Enable auto closure of incidents based on Resolution date (com.snc.incident.autoclose.basedon.resolved_at)
Number of days after which Resolved incidents are automatically closed (glide.ui.autoclose.time)
Enable create child incident feature (com.snc.incident.create.child.enable)
Enable copy incident feature (com.snc.incident.copy.enable)
explanation: The com.snc.incident.autoclose.basedon.resolved_at property controls whether the Autoclose Incidents job uses resolution date versus updated date when closing Resolved incidents.

prompt: An administrator needs the Autoclose Incidents scheduled job to record System Administrator in the Updated by field when incidents auto-close. What configuration is required?
choices: Set glide.email.smtp.active to true on the MID Server configuration record
Add fcRunAs=<user_name> and fcScriptName=incident autoclose to the job context
Enable the Enable copy change feature property on the Change form
Create a UI policy on the Problem table named Autoclose Incidents
explanation: The Autoclose Incidents scheduled job accepts fcRunAs in Job context so auto-closed incidents show the specified user in Updated by instead of the administrator logged in when the job runs.

prompt: Which Predictive Intelligence solution definition for Incident Management predicts the Assignment group field from the Short description?
choices: Similar Open Incidents
Incident Assignment
Major Incident Detection
Similar Closed Incidents
explanation: Incident Assignment is a classification solution that predicts Assignment group from Short description; Incident Categorization predicts Category from the same field.

prompt: Which plugins must be active to use Predictive Intelligence classification solutions such as Incident Assignment and Incident Categorization?
choices: com.snc.software_asset_management only
com.snc.incident.mim.ml_solution without com.glide.platform_ml
com.glide.platform_ml and com.snc.incident.ml_solution
com.snc.best_practice.problem.jakarta only
explanation: Classification solutions for incident assignment and categorization require both the platform ML plugin (com.glide.platform_ml) and Predictive Intelligence for Incident Management (com.snc.incident.ml_solution).

prompt: Where does the default variable editor (com.glideapp.questionset.DefaultQuestionEditor) display values submitted through a record producer?
choices: On the service catalog item definition form before the record is created
On the Requested Item [sc_req_item] form for standard catalog items only
On the catalog homepage gauge widget for all self-service users
On the target task record form for records generated by the record producer
explanation: The default variable editor is a formatter on task-extended target records created by a record producer; by default it applies to Incident and Change records generated that way.
